## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.8

### 🔔 Notifications
- Fires an immediate pending camera event for motion recordings, then fires the recording-ready event only after cached media is available.
- Prevents stale event-entity recording attributes from being reused on real camera triggers.
- Keeps plain motion notifications available when recording links are turned off without duplicating them after media becomes ready.

### 🎥 Recordings
- Adds frontend playback diagnostics for the X-Sense Recordings panel, including route selection, fetch status, blob size, and video playback state.
- Adds a release-version cache buster to the recordings panel module so Home Assistant does not keep using stale panel JavaScript after updates.

### 🛠️ Repairs
- Updates the camera notification blueprint stale-version repair markers for the new recording-ready notification flow.
- Updates README wording across the language files to describe the current cached-media notification behavior.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for pending and ready camera recording events, stale blueprint detection, authenticated panel playback, and sanitized frontend playback diagnostics.
